reviewer_remediation_notes: Moved CLI commit2 authorization before RepoExclusiveGuard acquisition: target resolution now runs under shared read access, enforce_commit_gate_for_target runs next, and exclusive access is acquired only before change selection and mutation.

Added resolved CommitGateTarget support so direct branch commits check branch protection while new-branch, branch-bucket, and commit-relative commits still require contents:write with branch protection N/A.
Added CLI snapbox commit_gate tests for branch.protected, perm.denied, and config.invalid behavior through the real but binary.

Cargo.lock changed when cargo reconciled the already-added but-api dependency/dev-dependency entries for but-authz, serial_test, and temp-env; the lockfile update is included so the worktree is not left stale.

commands.note: default feature set compiled test targets and found 0 matching commit_gate tests because commit2 is behind the but-2 feature
rustdoc emitted an existing unresolved-link warning in crates/but-api/src/open/editor.rs
